sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Fulham have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, securing 2 wins and 3 losses, with a tendency to concede goals (9 matches without a clean sheet). Manchester City, despite a recent loss, have a strong record with 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss in their last 5, often dominating possession and creating chances.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Manchester City have a dominant record against Fulham, winning all of the last 5 encounters. The last two head-to-head matches saw high-scoring affairs, with results of 3-2 and 0-4, indicating City's attacking prowess against Fulham.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Fulham sit 10th with 54 points, scoring 54 goals but struggling defensively (52 conceded). Manchester City, 3rd with 68 points, have scored 70 goals, showing superior attacking strength and a better goals conceded tally (44).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Fulham rely on players like Raul Jimenez and Alex Iwobi for goals and creativity, but missing players like Rodrigo Muniz may hurt their attack. Manchester City's Erling Haaland and Kevin De Bruyne are in form, with City's high possession (often over 60%) likely to pressure Fulham's defense.
